AuthorDetails.Name: Daniel Schmidt
AuthorDetails.Description: Open-source Umbraco package developer focused on useful, editor-friendly backoffice integrations.

Title: Web Analytics
Description: View Vercel Web Analytics inside the Umbraco backoffice. Explore traffic, visitors, referrers, pages, routes, campaigns, UTM parameters, and custom events, with route-filtered analytics available directly on published documents.

Screenshots.Caption: Explore visitors, page views, traffic history, popular pages, and referrers from the Analytics section.
Understand audience devices and locations alongside custom events and feature flags.
Drill into custom event properties and compare visitors with total events.
Configure access, caching, project connections, and document analytics mappings in Umbraco.
